clusters.justification: These terms share robust co-activation within cortico-amygdala and anterior insula circuitries that govern the processing of valence, arousal, and broad emotional states.
This cluster maps onto mesolimbic dopamine pathways and ventromedial prefrontal cortices responsible for computing incentive salience, weighting outcomes, and driving goal-directed behavior.
These concepts are unified by their reliance on the default mode network to construct internal, abstract models of the self, personal narratives, and the mental states of others.
